title: bony input script
description: bony.input-script.v1: a JSON file that drives the golden-gen harness through one or more time-sampled poses, optionally with project-owned state-machine inputs.

format.description: Sentinel that identifies this file as a bony input script.

asset.description: Basename of the conformance asset file (e.g. 'm2_rig.bony'). Resolved relative to the sibling assets/ directory: conformance/scripts/<asset> -> conformance/assets/<asset>.

stateMachine.description: Optional target state-machine name for scripts that replay typed inputs. Scripts without this field keep the legacy setup-pose path.

activeSkin.description: Optional runtime skin selected while building draw batches for this script. Omitted scripts use the required default skin.

samples.description: Ordered list of time samples to evaluate. Each sample drives one golden-gen invocation; state-machine scripts use sample names for collision-free golden filenames.

name.description: Optional stable sample identifier. Required by the conformance runner when stateMachine is present. Numeric-only names are reserved for CLI sample indexes.

t.description: Absolute script time in seconds. Setup-pose scripts still require t=0.0; state-machine scripts apply sample inputs, advance by the delta from the previous sample time, and then evaluate.

inputs.description: Named state-machine inputs at this sample. Boolean values target bool inputs, numeric values target number inputs, and the string "fire" targets trigger inputs. Empty object ({}) means no input changes.
